description: This episode of Solana Bytes discusses the Mint close authority extension, enabling the closure of mint accounts in the token 2022 program. It covers the process of creating a token mint, applying the extension, and closing the account, emphasizing that a token mint can only be closed if its supply is zero.
topic_summary: Exploration of the Mint close authority extension in the Solana token program, including practical implementation and limitations [t=0:24 - t=98:07].
